title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at HP India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at HP India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at HP India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Gurgaon-based team.

About HP India:
HP India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HP India!
